title: Eyas Changelog
description: A structured version history for the Eyas application.

notes.description: Overall summary or highlight for this release. Supports inline code (backticks) and links [text](url).

listType.description: The type of list to use for the main items.

items.description: A list of changes for this version.

text.description: The change description. Supports inline code (backticks) and links [text](url).

subItemsType.description: The type of list to use for the sub-items.
